params.name: compute_stream
params.description: Name of compute stream to pull detections from

actions.name: ElevateToAltitude
actions.description: Climb to a target altitude by setting vertical velocity until reached.

params.name: tolerance
params.description: stop when within this of target

params.name: climb_speed
params.description: m/s (adjust sign for your FCU if needed)

actions.name: Hold
actions.description: Order the vehicle to hold/loiter. Causes the vehicle to hold at its current location and to cancel any ongoing movement commands (`ReturnToHome` e.g.).

actions.name: Joystick
actions.description: Send a joystick command to the vehicle. Causes the vehicle to accelerate towards a provided velocity setpoint. This is useful for fine-grained control based on streamed datasink results or for tele-operating the vehicle from a remote commander. Attributes: velocity (common.Velocity): target velocity to move towards

params.name: velocity
params.description: Target velocity to move towards (x_vel, y_vel, z_vel, angular_vel).

actions.name: Land
actions.description: Order the vehicle to land. Causes the vehicle to land at its current location. If the vehicle is not a UAV, this method will be unimplemented.

actions.name: Patrol
actions.description: Fly through a sequence of waypoints generated from an area and slicing algorithm.

params.name: hover_time
params.description: seconds to hover after each move

params.name: waypoints
params.description: Waypoints definition (area, alt, algo, spacing, angle_degrees, trigger_distance).

params.name: max_velocity
params.description: Maximum velocity to use while transiting between waypoints.

actions.name: PrePatrolSequence
actions.description: Elevate to altitude and set gimbal pitch before starting a patrol.

actions.name: PrecisionLand
actions.description: Land on an object using vision-based control.

params.name: compute_stream
params.description: Name of compute stream to pull detections from

params.name: target
params.description: Detection to track (class_name to match, optional score threshold)

actions.name: ReturnToHome
actions.description: Order the vehicle to return to its home position. Causes the vehicle to return to its home position. If the home position has not been explicitly set, this will be its start position (defined as its takeoff position for UAVs). If the home position has been explicitly set, by `SetHome`, the vehicle will return to that position instead.

actions.name: SetGimbalPose
actions.description: Order the vehicle to set the pose of a gimbal. Causes the vehicle to actuate a gimbal to a new pose. The vehicle will interpret the new pose type from `pose_mode` as follows: - `ABSOLUTE` -> absolute angle - `RELATIVE` -> angle relative to current position - `VELOCITY` -> angular velocities The vehicle will interpret the new pose angles according to `frame` as follows: - `BODY` -> (`pitch`, `roll`, `yaw`) = (body pitch, body roll, body yaw) - `NEU` -> (`pitch`, `roll`, `yaw`) = (body pitch, body roll, global yaw) Attributes: gimbal_id (int): ID of the target gimbal pose (common.Pose): target pose pose_mode (Optional[params.PoseMode]): specifies how to interpret the target pose frame (Optional[params.ReferenceFrame]): frame of reference

params.name: pose_mode
params.description: How to interpret the pose. Enum values: 0=ANGLE (absolute), 1=OFFSET (from current), 2=VELOCITY (rotational).

actions.name: SetGimbalPoseTarget
actions.description: Set the target pose of a gimbal without streaming feedback.

params.name: pose_mode
params.description: How to interpret the pose. Enum values: 0=ANGLE (absolute), 1=OFFSET (from current), 2=VELOCITY (rotational).

actions.name: SetGlobalPosition
actions.description: Order the vehicle to move to a global position. Causes the vehicle to transit to the provided global position. The vehicle will interpret the heading of travel according to `heading_mode`: - `TO_TARGET` -> turn to face the target position bearing - `HEADING_START` -> turn to face the provided heading in the global position object. This will be the heading the vehicle maintains for the duration of transit. Generally only UAVs will support `HEADING_START`. The vehicle will move towards the target at the specified maximum velocity until the vehicle has reached its destination. Error tolerance is determined by the driver. Maximum velocity is interpreted from `max_velocity` as follows: - `x_vel` -> maximum _horizontal_ velocity - `y_vel` -> ignored - `z_vel` -> maximum _vertical_ velocity _(UAV only)_ If no maximum velocity is provided, the driver will use a preset speed usually determined by the manufacturer or hardware settings. _(UAV only)_ During motion, the vehicle will also ascend or descend towards the target altitude, linearly interpolating this movement over the duration of travel. The vehicle will interpret altitude from `altitude_mode` as follows: - `ABSOLUTE` -> altitude is relative to MSL (Mean Sea Level) - `RELATIVE` -> altitude is relative to take off position Attributes: location (common.Location): target global position heading_mode (Optional[params.HeadingMode]): determines how the vehicle will orient during transit (default: `TO_TARGET`) altitude_mode (Optional[params.AltitudeMode]): determines how the vehicle will interpret altitude (default: `ABSOLUTE`) max_velocity (Optional[common.Velocity]): maximum velocity during transit

params.name: location
params.description: Target global position (latitude, longitude, altitude, heading).

params.name: heading_mode
params.description: How the vehicle orients during transit. Enum values: 0=TO_TARGET (face target bearing), 1=HEADING_START (face given heading).

params.name: altitude_mode
params.description: How the vehicle interprets altitude. Enum values: 0=ABSOLUTE (meters above MSL), 1=RELATIVE (meters above takeoff).

params.name: max_velocity
params.description: Maximum velocity during transit. x_vel=max horizontal, z_vel=max vertical [m/s].

actions.name: SetHeading
actions.description: Order the vehicle to set a new heading. Causes the vehicle to turn to face the provided global position. The vehicle will interpret the final heading according to `heading_mode`: - `TO_TARGET` -> turn to face the target position bearing - `HEADING_START` -> turn to face the provided heading in the global position object. Attributes: location (common.Location): target heading or global location to look at heading_mode (Optional[params.HeadingMode]): determines how the vehicle will orient

params.name: location
params.description: Target heading or global location to orient towards.

params.name: heading_mode
params.description: How the vehicle orients. Enum values: 0=TO_TARGET (face target bearing), 1=HEADING_START (face given heading).

actions.name: SetHome
actions.description: Set the home location of the vehicle. Changes the home location of the vehicle. Future `ReturnToHome` commands will move the vehicle to the provided location instead of its starting position. Attributes: location (common.Location): new home location

params.name: location
params.description: New home location (latitude, longitude, altitude, heading).

actions.name: SetRelativePosition
actions.description: Order the vehicle to move to a relative position. Causes the vehicle to transit to the provided relative position. The vehicle will interpret the input position according to `frame` as follows: - `BODY` -> (`x`, `y`, `z`) = (forward offset, right offset, up offset) _from current position_ - `NEU` -> (`x`, `y`, `z`) = (north offset, east offset, up offset) _from start position_ The vehicle will move towards the target at the specified maximum velocity until the vehicle has reached its destination. Error tolerance is determined by the driver. Maximum velocity is interpreted from `max_velocity` as follows: - `x_vel` -> maximum _horizontal_ velocity - `y_vel` -> ignored - `z_vel` -> maximum _vertical_ velocity _(UAV only)_ If no maximum velocity is provided, the driver will use a preset speed usually determined by the manufacturer or hardware settings. Attributes: position (common.Position): target relative position max_velocity (Optional[common.Velocity]): maximum velocity during transit frame (Optional[params.ReferenceFrame]): frame of reference

params.name: position
params.description: Target relative position (x, y, z offsets). Interpretation depends on frame.

params.name: max_velocity
params.description: Maximum velocity during transit. x_vel=max horizontal, z_vel=max vertical [m/s].

params.name: frame
params.description: Reference frame. Enum values: 0=BODY (forward/right/up from current), 1=NEU (north/east/up from start).

actions.name: TakeOff
actions.description: Order the vehicle to take off. Causes the vehicle to take off to a specified take off altitude. If the vehicle is not a UAV, this method will be unimplemented. Attributes: take_off_altitude (float): take off height in relative altitude [meters]

params.name: take_off_altitude
params.description: Take off height in relative altitude [meters].

actions.name: Track
actions.description: Track a detected object using vision-based control, adjusting yaw and gimbal to follow the target.

params.name: compute_stream
params.description: Name of compute stream to pull detections from

params.name: target
params.description: Detection to track (class_name to match, optional score threshold)

params.name: leash_distance
params.description: leashing distance towards the tracked target

params.name: yaw_gain
params.description: Gain applied to yaw error before sending to FCU

params.name: follow_gain
params.description: Gain applied to follow error before sending to FCU

params.name: target_altitude
params.description: Target altitude to descend to while tracking

params.name: altitude_tolerance
params.description: Tolerance at which altitude will be checked for descending

params.name: strafe
params.description: Whether or not to move left/right when following

params.name: gimbal_lock
params.description: Whether or not to lock the gimbal in position

events.name: AltitudeReached
events.description: True if telemetry reports being within tolerance of altitude.

params.name: use_absolute
params.description: Whether to use absolute altitude (MSL) instead of AGL altitude.

params.name: threshold
params.description: Battery percentage [0-100] at or below which this event fires.

events.name: BoundingBoxCentered
events.description: True if the bounding box of the given class is centered in frame.

params.name: compute_stream
params.description: Name of compute stream to get results from

events.name: DetectionFound
events.description: True if any detection matches optional class_name and min score.

params.name: target
params.description: Detection filter (class_name to match, optional minimum score threshold).

events.name: GimbalPoseReached
events.description: Checks provided axes only; abs error <= tol_deg.

params.name: target
params.description: Target gimbal pose (pitch, roll, yaw) [degrees]. Only provided axes are checked.

events.name: GlobalPositionReached
events.description: True when the current global_position matches the target within tolerance. Uses great-circle distance for lat/lon, and optional checks for altitude and heading. Compares only fields provided on `target`.

params.name: target
params.description: Target global position (latitude, longitude, altitude, heading). Only provided fields are checked.

events.name: HSVReached
events.description: True if any result reports HSV close to target, or 'hsv_pass': true. Looks only in ComputeResult.generic_result (JSON).

params.name: target
params.description: Target HSV color values (h: 0-179, s: 0-255, v: 0-255). Only provided components are checked.

params.name: tol
params.description: Allowed absolute error per HSV component.

events.name: RelativePositionReached
events.description: True when the current relative_position matches the target within tolerance. Compares only fields provided on `target`.

params.name: target
params.description: Target relative position (x, y, z, angle). Only provided fields are checked.

params.name: threshold
params.description: Minimum number of GPS satellites required for this event to fire.

events.name: TimeReached
events.description: True after a specified duration has elapsed.

params.name: duration
params.description: Seconds to wait before returning true.

events.name: VelocityReached
events.description: True when the selected frame's velocity matches the target (per-component) within tolerance.

params.name: frame
params.description: Reference frame to check velocity in. Enum values: 0=BODY (vehicle frame), 1=NEU (North-East-Up).

params.name: target
params.description: Target velocity (x_vel, y_vel, z_vel, angular_vel). Only provided components are checked.

datatypes.name: AlertInfo
datatypes.description: Vehicle warnings and alerts. Attributes: battery_warning (Optional[BatteryWarning]): Battery warning level (0-2). gps_warning (Optional[GPSWarning]): GPS fix warning (0-2). magnetometer_warning (Optional[MagnetometerWarning]): Magnetometer warning (0-1). connection_warning (Optional[ConnectionWarning]): Connection warning (0-2). compass_warning (Optional[CompassWarning]): Compass heading warning (0-2).

params.name: gps_warning
params.description: GPS fix warning. Enum values: 0=nominal, 1=weak fix, 2=no fix.

params.name: compass_warning
params.description: Compass heading warning. Enum values: 0=nominal, 1=weak heading lock, 2=no heading lock.

datatypes.name: AvoidanceResult
datatypes.description: Avoidance result from an avoidance model. Attributes: actuation_vector (Optional[float]): Actuation vector towards safe area.

datatypes.name: BatteryInfo
datatypes.description: Vehicle battery information. Attributes: percentage (Optional[int]): Battery level [0-100]%.

datatypes.name: BoundingBox
datatypes.description: Bounding box for an object detection. Origin (0,0) is top-left of image. Attributes: y_min (Optional[float]): Minimum y offset as percentage of image height [0.0-1.0]. x_min (Optional[float]): Minimum x offset as percentage of image width [0.0-1.0]. y_max (Optional[float]): Maximum y offset as percentage of image height [0.0-1.0]. x_max (Optional[float]): Maximum x offset as percentage of image width [0.0-1.0].

params.name: y_min
params.description: Minimum y offset as percentage of image height [0.0-1.0].

params.name: x_min
params.description: Minimum x offset as percentage of image width [0.0-1.0].

params.name: y_max
params.description: Maximum y offset as percentage of image height [0.0-1.0].

params.name: x_max
params.description: Maximum x offset as percentage of image width [0.0-1.0].

datatypes.name: CommsInfo
datatypes.description: Vehicle communication link information (future).

datatypes.name: ComputeResult
datatypes.description: Compute result from a compute server.

datatypes.name: DatasinkInfo
datatypes.description: Information about a compute datasink.

params.name: location
params.description: Datasink location. Enum values: 0=REMOTE (network hop required), 1=LOCAL (IPC).

datatypes.name: Detection
datatypes.description: Single object detection from a model. Attributes: detection_id (Optional[int]): Detection ID (multiple objects per frame). class_name (Optional[str]): Class name of detection. score (Optional[float]): Confidence score. bbox (Optional[BoundingBox]): Bounding box of the detection.

datatypes.name: DetectionResult
datatypes.description: List of object detections for a frame. Attributes: detections (Optional[List[Detection]]): List of detections. frame_id (Optional[int]): Frame ID corresponding to these detections.

params.name: frame_id
params.description: Frame ID corresponding to these detections.

datatypes.name: DriverTelemetry
datatypes.description: Full vehicle telemetry message from the driver module. Attributes: timestamp (Optional[Timestamp]): Message timestamp. telemetry_stream_info (Optional[TelemetryStreamInfo]): Telemetry stream info. vehicle_info (Optional[VehicleInfo]): Vehicle identity and status. position_info (Optional[PositionInfo]): Position, velocity, and setpoint info. gimbal_info (Optional[GimbalInfo]): Gimbal statuses. imaging_sensor_info (Optional[ImagingSensorInfo]): Imaging sensor info. alert_info (Optional[AlertInfo]): Vehicle warnings.

datatypes.name: Frame
datatypes.description: Imaging sensor frame data from the driver module. Attributes: timestamp (Optional[Timestamp]): Frame capture timestamp. data (Optional[bytes]): Raw frame bytes. h_res (Optional[int]): Horizontal resolution [pixels]. v_res (Optional[int]): Vertical resolution [pixels]. d_res (Optional[int]): Depth resolution [pixels]. channels (Optional[int]): Number of image channels. id (Optional[int]): Frame ID for correlation.

datatypes.name: FrameResult
datatypes.description: Compute results generated by datasink modules for a frame.

datatypes.name: GPSInfo
datatypes.description: Vehicle GPS fix information. Attributes: satellites (Optional[int]): Number of satellites in GPS fix.

params.name: satellites
params.description: Number of satellites in GPS fix.

datatypes.name: GimbalInfo
datatypes.description: Info on all attached gimbals. Attributes: num_gimbals (Optional[int]): Number of connected gimbals. gimbals (Optional[List[GimbalStatus]]): List of gimbal statuses.

datatypes.name: GimbalStatus
datatypes.description: Status of a single gimbal. Attributes: id (Optional[int]): Gimbal ID. pose_body (Optional[Pose]): Current pose in body frame. pose_neu (Optional[Pose]): Current pose in NEU frame.

datatypes.name: HSV
datatypes.description: HSV color filter values (OpenCV ranges). Attributes: h (Optional[int]): Hue [0-179]. s (Optional[int]): Saturation [0-255]. v (Optional[int]): Value [0-255].

datatypes.name: ImagingSensorConfiguration
datatypes.description: Configuration for an imaging sensor stream.

params.name: set_primary
params.description: Set this sensor as the primary stream.

datatypes.name: ImagingSensorInfo
datatypes.description: Information about all attached imaging sensors. Attributes: stream_status (Optional[ImagingSensorStreamStatus]): Current stream status. sensors (Optional[List[ImagingSensorStatus]]): List of connected sensors.

datatypes.name: ImagingSensorStatus
datatypes.description: Status of a single imaging sensor. Attributes: id (Optional[int]): Imaging sensor ID. type (Optional[ImagingSensorType]): Sensor type (0-7). active (Optional[bool]): Whether the sensor is currently streaming. supports_secondary (Optional[bool]): Whether the sensor supports background streaming. current_fps (Optional[int]): Current streaming FPS. max_fps (Optional[int]): Maximum streaming FPS. h_res (Optional[int]): Horizontal resolution [pixels]. v_res (Optional[int]): Vertical resolution [pixels]. channels (Optional[int]): Number of image channels. h_fov (Optional[int]): Horizontal FOV [degrees]. v_fov (Optional[int]): Vertical FOV [degrees]. gimbal_mounted (Optional[bool]): Whether sensor is gimbal-mounted. gimbal_id (Optional[int]): ID of gimbal the sensor is mounted on.

params.name: active
params.description: Whether the sensor is currently streaming.

params.name: supports_secondary
params.description: Whether the sensor supports background streaming.

params.name: gimbal_id
params.description: ID of gimbal the sensor is mounted on.

datatypes.name: ImagingSensorStreamStatus
datatypes.description: Status of imaging sensor streams. Attributes: stream_capacity (Optional[int]): Max allowed simultaneous streams. num_streams (Optional[int]): Currently active stream count. primary_cam (Optional[int]): ID of the primary camera. secondary_cams (Optional[List[int]]): IDs of secondary active cameras.

datatypes.name: Location
datatypes.description: Location in global (GPS) coordinates. Attributes: latitude (Optional[float]): Global latitude [degrees]. longitude (Optional[float]): Global longitude [degrees]. altitude (Optional[float]): Altitude above MSL or takeoff [meters]. heading (Optional[float]): Global heading [degrees].

datatypes.name: MissionInfo
datatypes.description: Information about a single mission. Attributes: name (Optional[str]): Mission name. hash (Optional[int]): Mission hash. age (Optional[Timestamp]): Mission age timestamp. exec_state (Optional[MissionExecState]): Execution state (0-4). task_state (Optional[str]): Current task state.

datatypes.name: MissionTelemetry
datatypes.description: Mission telemetry message. Attributes: timestamp (Optional[Timestamp]): Message timestamp. telemetry_stream_info (Optional[TelemetryStreamInfo]): Telemetry stream info. mission_info (Optional[List[MissionInfo]]): List of mission statuses.

datatypes.name: Pose
datatypes.description: Angular offsets or poses in 3 dimensions. Attributes: pitch (Optional[float]): Pitch angle [degrees]. roll (Optional[float]): Roll angle [degrees]. yaw (Optional[float]): Yaw angle [degrees].

datatypes.name: Position
datatypes.description: Position offset relative to home or current location. Attributes: x (Optional[float]): Forward/north offset [meters]. y (Optional[float]): Right/east offset [meters]. z (Optional[float]): Up offset [meters]. angle (Optional[float]): Angular offset [degrees].

datatypes.name: PositionInfo
datatypes.description: Vehicle position information including home, global, relative positions and velocity. Attributes: home (Optional[Location]): Home position used for ReturnToHome. global_position (Optional[Location]): Current global position (requires GPS fix). relative_position (Optional[Position]): Local position in NEU frame, relative to start. velocity_neu (Optional[Velocity]): Current velocity in NEU frame. velocity_body (Optional[Velocity]): Current velocity in body frame. setpoint_info (Optional[SetpointInfo]): Current vehicle setpoint.

params.name: relative_position
params.description: Local position in NEU frame, relative to start.

datatypes.name: SLAMResult
datatypes.description: SLAM position estimate.

params.name: relative_position
params.description: Relative position estimate from SLAM initialization.

datatypes.name: SetpointInfo
datatypes.description: Current vehicle setpoint (position/velocity target the vehicle is moving towards). Attributes: position_body_sp (Optional[Position]): Body frame position setpoint. position_neu_sp (Optional[Position]): NEU position setpoint. global_sp (Optional[Location]): Global position setpoint. velocity_body_sp (Optional[Velocity]): Body frame velocity setpoint. velocity_neu_sp (Optional[Velocity]): NEU velocity setpoint.

params.name: position_body_sp
params.description: Body frame position setpoint (default idle: all zeros).

datatypes.name: TelemetryStreamInfo
datatypes.description: Information about the telemetry stream. Attributes: current_frequency (Optional[int]): Current telemetry frequency [Hz]. max_frequency (Optional[int]): Maximum telemetry frequency [Hz].

datatypes.name: Timestamp
datatypes.description: Unix timestamp with nanosecond resolution (seconds since 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z).

params.name: seconds
params.description: Seconds of UTC time since Unix epoch 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z.

datatypes.name: VehicleInfo
datatypes.description: Vehicle identity and status information. Attributes: name (Optional[str]): Vehicle name. model (Optional[str]): Vehicle model. manufacturer (Optional[str]): Vehicle manufacturer. motion_status (Optional[MotionStatus]): Current motion status (0-4). battery_info (Optional[BatteryInfo]): Battery info. gps_info (Optional[GPSInfo]): GPS sensor info. comms_info (Optional[CommsInfo]): Communications info.

datatypes.name: Velocity
datatypes.description: Velocity in 3 dimensions. Attributes: x_vel (Optional[float]): Forward/north velocity [m/s]. y_vel (Optional[float]): Right/east velocity [m/s]. z_vel (Optional[float]): Up velocity [m/s]. angular_vel (Optional[float]): Angular velocity [deg/s].

datatypes.name: Waypoints
datatypes.description: A list of geolocation waypoints with a slicing algorithm for coverage patterns.

params.name: area
params.description: KML area name (string) or list of Location points defining the area.

params.name: alt
params.description: Altitude at which waypoints are visited [meters]. Altitudes in Location objects are ignored.

params.name: algo
params.description: Slicing algorithm: 'edge' follows points in order, 'survey'/'corridor' cover the enclosed area.

params.name: spacing
params.description: Spacing between survey/corridor columns [meters]. Required for survey/corridor.

params.name: angle_degrees
params.description: Angle of survey/corridor columns [degrees]. Required for survey/corridor.

params.name: trigger_distance
params.description: Distance before snapshot trigger [meters]. Required for survey only.
